[[Category:Lifeism Wiki]]{{History}}
The great November outage took the [[Lifeism Wiki|Lifeism Wiki]] offline on November 16th 2022 alongside the polcompball wiki. Data was recovered, but it caused a high level of confusion with multiple pages having versions needing merging. As of January 11th 2023 all pages have been reviewed, and all content is considered recovered. There may still be duplicate pages out there due to move issues though.
[[Category:Great November Outage]]
[[sn:Great November Outage]]

==Events detail==

* November 16th 2022 wiki went down
* Edits done on Immanuelle wiki instead
* Dec 2nd Wiki recreated
* Dec 22nd [[Minor December Outage]] starts
* Dec 29th [[Minor December Outage]] ends
* January 1st 2023, Wiki considered fixed
* January 11th all pages have been reviewed
* June 15 2023 [[Miraheze crisis]] begins

==Recovery process==
In hindsight many of these posts had issues before the outage
* [[Procheiron]]<ref name=":0">https://markmulvey.medium.com/awakening-from-the-meaning-crisis-by-john-vervaeke-ep-3dd53ea3703e</ref> and [[Prosoche]]<ref name=":0" />
** I think both are well done now
* Categorizing everything properly
** Needs work

==See Also==

* [[Miraheze crisis]]

==Footnotes==
<references group="lower-alpha"/>
{{notelist}}
<references group="note"/>

== References ==
[[Category:Pages]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
